features.description: /code-review now runs as a background subagent, keeping review work out of the conversation.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed `/code-review` to run as a background subagent, so review work no longer fills your conversation and keeps stacked slash commands as its review target

features.description: Agent frontmatter hooks now require the agent file's own folder to have accepted workspace trust.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed agent frontmatter hooks running from untrusted folders: hooks now require the agent file's own folder to have accepted workspace trust

features.description: Auto-mode classifier now adjudicates dangerous-rm, background-& and Windows-path checks instead of prompting.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved auto mode: the dangerous-rm, background-`&`, and suspicious-Windows-path checks no longer open permission dialogs; the auto-mode classifier adjudicates them instead

features.description: /deep-research now starts only when invoked manually and is no longer auto-launched by Claude.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed `/deep-research` to start only when invoked manually; Claude no longer launches it on its own

features.description: Plan mode with auto no longer prompts for unprovable-read-only Bash commands; the classifier judges them.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed plan mode with auto to no longer prompt for Bash commands the static analyzer can't prove read-only; the auto-mode classifier judges them instead

features.description: Server-managed benign feature and cost toggles no longer trigger the settings-approval prompt.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed server-managed settings so benign feature and cost toggles no longer trigger the settings-approval prompt

features.description: Agent markdown files now reject agent names containing ':', reserved for plugin namespacing.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed agent markdown files to reject agent names containing `:`, which is reserved for plugin namespacing

features.description: Skills with context: fork now run in the background by default; opt out per skill with background: false.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed skills with `context: fork` to run in the background by default; opt out per skill with `background: false`

features.description: claude mcp list and /mcp now show HTTP status/error text on failure plus an MCP config whitespace warning.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added HTTP status and error text to `claude mcp list` and `/mcp` when a server fails to connect, and a warning for MCP config values with hidden leading or trailing whitespace

features.description: Skill and plugin frontmatter booleans now accept yes/no/on/off/1/0 case-insensitively alongside true/false.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `yes`/`no`/`on`/`off`/`1`/`0` (case-insensitive) as accepted values for skill and plugin frontmatter booleans, alongside `true`/`false`
